hero.subtitle: To be the world's most reliable bridge for agricultural excellence, empowering global farmers and dealers with high-performance machinery and sustainable irrigation solutions.

service.subtitle: We don't just sell machines; we provide answers.

list.title: 17 Years of Industry Authority
list.description: Over a decade of experience means we understand soil conditions, machine durability, and the specific needs of different global markets. We don’t just sell; we consult.

list.title: One-Stop Sourcing Hub
list.description: From heavy-duty tractors and excavators to delicate drip irrigation tapes and spare parts, we consolidate your entire supply chain, saving you time and logistics costs.

list.title: Rigorous Quality Assurance
list.description: Every product undergoes a multi-stage inspection process before shipment. Our commitment to
ensures that your machinery arrives field-ready and built to last.

list.title: Lifelong Spare Parts Support
list.description: We recognize that a machine is only as good as its uptime. We maintain a robust inventory of genuine spare parts, ensuring your operations never grind to a halt.

footer.description: Building the foundation for modern investors. We provide professional financial solutions to help your business grow globally.

hero.subtitle: About Our Company
hero.title: Your Trusted Global Manufacturing Partner
hero.description: With 17 years of deep-rooted expertise, Jinan Hecoth is more than just an exporter; we are your strategic sourcing partner in China. We specialize in a comprehensive range of agricultural equipment—from powerful tractors and tillage tools like disc harrows and plows, to precision irrigation systems and mini construction machinery. Based in Jinan, we combine industrial strength with rigorous quality control to ensure every piece of equipment meets international standards

features.title: Why Partner With Us?
features.description: We don't just supply products; we provide complete solutions to help your business grow and stay competitive in the market.

list.title: OEM & ODM Capability
list.description: Strong R&D team and flexible production lines to customize machinery specifications, attachment compatibility, and regional adaptations perfectly.

list.title: Strict Quality Control
list.description: From forging steel to final field testing, every step is strictly monitored to ensure your equipment survives the toughest working conditions.

list.title: Global Export Experience
list.description: Familiar with international trade standards, EPA/CE certifications, and secure heavy-duty loading for smooth customs clearance.

list.title: Fast & Reliable Delivery
list.description: Optimized supply chain and strategic logistics partnerships ensure your goods arrive on time.

list.title: Advanced Technology
list.description: Equipped with state-of-the-art machinery to guarantee precision, efficiency, and scale.

list.title: 24/7 Professional Support
list.description: Our multilingual team provides technical troubleshooting and parts manual guidance with rapid responses and dedicated service.
